meaning: vt.构思,以为,持有vi.怀孕,考虑,设想
examples: Women, he says, should give up alcohol before they plan to conceive.
It is impossible to conceive of a self arising outside of social experience.
He apparently can't conceive of a world that is both growing and getting better.
But only about 350, 000 of them can afford the standard IVF treatment to conceive.
